login.title: Sign in to the PrimeTeam platform
login.opening_browser: I'll open your browser so you can sign in with @archprime.io.
login.opening_hint: (if it doesn't open, I'll show you the link to paste)
login.waiting: Waiting for you to authorize... (up to 5 minutes)
login.could_not_open: I couldn't open your browser automatically.
login.welcome: Welcome, {{name}} — your access is safely stored on this computer.
login.next_step: Next: run {{cmd}} to see your roles.

logout.already_out: You're already signed out — nothing to do.
logout.goodbye: Bye, {{name}} — access removed from this computer.

whoami.no_role: no role assigned yet — talk to Pablo

doctor.heading: pto doctor — environment diagnosis
doctor.check_gh_hint: Only needed if you contribute to the squad: https://cli.github.com
doctor.check_port_hint: Close other pto windows (or restart your computer) and try again.
doctor.check_supabase_hint: Check your internet and try again.
doctor.check_session_corrupted_hint: Run: pto login (to sign in again)
doctor.check_session_expired_hint: Run: pto refresh (or pto login if refresh fails)
doctor.check_folder_fail: this folder is not the squad clone
doctor.check_branch_alt_hint: You're off the main channel (fine only if you're testing something).
doctor.check_dirty_some: you have modified files in the clone
doctor.check_dirty_hint: This blocks pto update. If you don't remember what you changed, message Pablo.
doctor.ok_all: All good — your environment is healthy.
doctor.warnings_one: {{count}} warning — you can work, but worth fixing.
doctor.warnings_other: {{count}} warnings — you can work, but worth fixing.
doctor.failure_hint: Not sure how? Paste this output in Slack and ask Pablo for help.

start.action_login: sign in with your Google @archprime.io account
start.action_setup: first time? use the guided step-by-step
start.action_doctor: check if your environment is OK
start.daily_hint: Tip: run {{cmd}} every day — updates, checks and shows where you left off.

update.up_to_date: Your squad is up to date — nothing new.
update.deps_fail_hint: Run npm install manually, or message Pablo.
update.pull_fail_hint: Message Pablo with the output of pto doctor.
update.not_clone: This folder is not a clone of primeteam-ops.
update.branch_warn: You're on an alternate channel ({{branch}}) — update skipped for safety.
update.branch_hint: go back to the main channel: {{cmd}}
update.dirty_warn: You have unsaved changes in the clone — update skipped for safety.
update.dirty_hint: if you don't remember what you changed, run {{cmd}} and message Pablo.

setup.title: pto setup
setup.welcome_message:
I'll guide you step-by-step to get the CLI working.
You can cancel anytime with Ctrl+C — we resume where we left off.
setup.node_fail: You have Node {{version}}. We need v20 or higher.
setup.node_hint: Update at https://nodejs.org and run {{cmd}} again.
setup.git_hint: Install from https://git-scm.com and run {{cmd}} again.
setup.clone_fail: This folder is not a git clone: {{path}}
setup.clone_hint: Clone the squad first: git clone {{url}}
setup.bin_ask: Want to enable the global `pto` command? (Otherwise, use `npm start` in the squad folder.)
setup.bin_done: `pto` is now available anywhere in your terminal.
setup.bin_manual_hint:
Try manually:
  cd {{path}}
  sudo npm link

Or skip — use `npm start` inside the clone.
setup.bin_path_warn: Linked, but `pto` didn't appear on PATH.
setup.bin_restart_hint: You might need to restart your terminal.
setup.login_ask: Sign in with Google now? (opens your browser)
setup.identity_skipped: Skipped confirmation — you skipped the login.
setup.what_now_daily: {{cmd}} — daily routine (run every time you open the terminal)
setup.what_now_claude: {{cmd}} — open Claude Code in the squad folder
setup.what_now_doctor: {{cmd}} — if something doesn't work, run this diagnosis
setup.already_done_ask: Want to run it again anyway?
setup.already_done_skip: OK, nothing to do. Run {{cmd}} to check your environment.
setup.cancelled: Setup cancelled — run {{cmd}} again when you want to continue.

hygiene.absent_days_one: You haven't run `pto` in {{count}} day — pulling what changed...
hygiene.absent_days_other: You haven't run `pto` in {{count}} days — pulling what changed...

lang.source_auto: (detected from your system — not yet chosen)
lang.reset: Language preference removed. Next run, I'll detect from your system.
lang.unsupported: Language '{{value}}' not supported. Available: pt-BR, it, en.
lang.first_run_note: You can change later with: pto lang set <pt-BR|it|en>
